name: Lakeshore Acquisition III Corp.
business: Lakeshore Acquisition III Corp. is a blank check company incorporated in the Cayman Islands on October 21, 2024, formed for the purpose of entering into a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, or similar business combination with one or more businesses. As of December 31, 2025, the company had not commenced any operations and had no revenue.

catalysts.event: Deadline to consummate initial business combination
catalysts.sentence: We will have up to 15 months from the closing of the IPO (August 1, 2026), or until such earlier liquidation date as our board of directors may approve, to consummate an initial business combination.
